sha_binding.verified_source_note: PR-head commit for the SGO game-line/player-prop fetch split (UTV2-1275 Wave 1). Rebound to the merge SHA post-merge.

pnpm_verify.note: lint + type-check + build + full test matrix + smart-form verify + verify:commands

runtime_proof.note: Live Supabase DB smoke. No production rows mutated by this lane; ingestor request-construction change only. Live-slate confirmation (provider_offer_history player-row increase + non-stale candidate) is a post-deploy runtime check.

root_cause.summary: Single SGO odds request collapsed to bookmakerID=pinnacle on peak (UNIT_TALK_INGESTOR_PINNACLE_ONLY_PEAK=true in prod); Pinnacle carries no MLB player props, so props were filtered out at ingestion. PLAYER_ID fetch path existed but was never wired into the runner.
root_cause.category: A+B: player props filtered by Pinnacle-only request; PLAYER_ID oddID patterns not used in production
